_note: Floor: the description's header says 5th floor, but its elevator line says 3rd (a leftover from a cited source). Using 5th — Robert, please confirm.
amenities: Fully equipped kitchen (fridge, oven, microwave, stovetop, dishwasher)
description: Welcome to your perfect Mediterranean getaway. On the 5th floor of a well-maintained building in the heart of Calpe, this spacious three-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers the ultimate blend of coastal convenience and comfort. It sits just steps from the soft sands of Arenal-Bol Beach, so you can leave the car behind and enjoy everything Calpe has to offer on foot.

Thoughtfully laid out for up to six guests, it's ideal for families or groups of friends. A bright, open-plan living and dining area is made for relaxing after a sunny day at the beach, the fully equipped kitchen is ready for home-cooked meals, and the private terrace is the spot for morning coffee or dining alfresco in the warm evening air.
